# Real W1 association evidence

`w1_real_summary.json` describes a clean same-run RuntimeEvent and ROS 2 CTF
capture. Large raw and normalized files remain outside Git. Their SHA-256
digests are frozen in the summary, together with the source commit and raw CTF
location.

The accepted rate is an evidence-admission statistic, not association
accuracy. Precision, recall, F1, and mixed-trace rate require the independent
oracle still listed in Task 3.4.
